title: Khris Middleton: Midrange Recall
objective: Survive a four-quarter rush of increasingly dense shot-call sequences by replaying each possession correctly, protecting your lives, and stacking a perfect-possession combo for a high leaderboard score.

controls.input: Tap one of the five court zones
controls.outcome: Replays that pulse in the sequence order

controls.input: Press and hold on glowing final notes
controls.outcome: Banks bonus points on long buzzer-beater pulses
Keeps the possession safer but loses multiplier growth

steps: Listen to a short sequence of court pulses played with sneaker squeaks, dribbles, and a horn.
Watch the zones light in order across five touch targets: left wing, top key, middle lane, right wing, and corner.
Replay the exact sequence from memory before the shot clock ring expires.
Every few possessions, the 'Middleton Shift' changes the rule on the center lane: it may invert the next tap, double its value, or lock it,
Choose whether to include the flashing middle-lane bonus notes for combo growth or play the safer base sequence.
Miss a tap, break the order, or run out of time and you lose a possession life; lose three lives and the run ends.
scoring: Score points for each correct pulse, earn a rising combo multiplier for perfect possessions, and cash extra bonus on accurate held finishers; middle-lane bonus calls sharply raise score but reset combo if missed.
tips: Learn the sound families first: dribble for outer lanes, clap for wings, horn for the middle finisher.
When the Middleton Shift appears, pause for half a beat and confirm the center-lane rule before tapping.
Short safe streaks beat greedy bonus misses if you are protecting a high multiplier.
